name: datagen
description: Generate synthetic yet realistic datasets from a business context. Two skills: Dataset-Research, a standalone skill that does web-grounded domain research and produces a visual report backed by a spec file, and Dataset-Generator, which calls Dataset-Research for grounding and then compiles a YAML recipe and builds multi-table datasets with referential integrity, distributions, constraints, and LLM text columns. Both require a business context, an objective, and additional comments before they do anything.
